# Lelam eAuctions Assistant

> An independent government auction intelligence platform that indexes, normalizes, and analyzes government eAuctions (like MSTC India) to help bidders make informed, data-driven decisions.

Detailed features and capabilities:
* eAuctions Catalog Search: NLP-powered search that parses technical metal grades, locations, and scrap types.
* Dynamic Bid & Cost Calculator: Computes landed costs (GST, TCS, Customs duties, loading fees, and transport) to project bidding ROI.
* Scrap Metal Price Valuation: Linear regression model forecasting Indian metal scrap price ranges based on LME & local benchmarks.
* Watchlist & Bookmark Management: Real-time tracking and bookmarking of upcoming government eAuctions.
* PDF Catalog Processor: Auto-indexing of official government catalog PDF documents in secure storage.

AI Agent and Crawler Information:
* Allowed Directories: /faq, /auctions, /about, /contact, /news, /cookies are open to crawling.
* Disallowed Directories: /auth/, /admin/, /dashboard/, /api/ are blocked for privacy and user data protection.
* Data Freshness: Government eAuction schedules are uploaded on the platform, processed, and updated regularly.

## Site Structure & Navigation

- [Homepage](/) - Features global search, live statistics, and recent news.
- [Auctions Directory](/auctions) - Search directory for all active, upcoming, and closed eAuctions.
- [Tenders Directory](/tenders) - B2B bidding directory for tenders and procurement opportunities.
- [News & Price Alerts](/news) - Industry news, LME price alerts, and platform announcements.
- [eAuctions Help Center](/faq) - Help center containing schema for common questions.
- [About](/about) - Core platform values, whitepapers, and branding updates.
- [Contact](/contact) - Support channel and corporate inquiry messaging.

## Optional

- [Robots Configuration](/robots.txt) - Rules for web crawlers.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml) - Structured index of public pages.
